data.content:
Implementation plan for overview tags and filters

Scope
- Add display of user-visible beat labels in the overview tile. Use Beat.labels as the source and filter out internal labels such as stage:*, orchestration wave labels, and empty strings before rendering compact badges.
- Add overview-only filters for tags and setlists. Filters should work independently or together: OR within selected tags, OR within selected setlists, AND between the tag and setlist groups.
- Build setlist options from PlanSummary data. Each option label should include the plan artifact id plus the first 40 characters of the setlist title; if the plan has no separate title field, use the summary/objective fallback already shown in setlist cards.
- Match setlist membership with plan.beatIds against each beat id and aliases. In all-repositories overview, keep plan repoPath with the option and only match beats from the same _repoPath.

Likely file changes
- Add a new small helper module rather than growing src/lib/beat-state-overview.ts, which is already near the 500-line limit. Suggested helper: src/lib/beat-state-overview-filters.ts for tag normalization, setlist option formatting, membership indexing, and filter application.
- Update src/components/beat-overview-tile.tsx to render tag badges under existing metadata without expanding the tile layout unpredictably.
- Update src/components/beat-state-overview.tsx and/or src/components/beat-state-overview-matrix.tsx to own selected tag/setlist state, derive options, apply filtered beats before tab counts/groups, and render a compact toolbar next to stale grooming.
- Avoid increasing src/app/beats/page.tsx because it is already over the repo 500-line source limit; if repo context is needed, extract a small hook/component instead of adding page weight.

Data strategy
- Reuse fetchPlanSummaries from src/lib/plan-api.ts. For a single active repo, fetch plans for that repo. For all-repositories overview, fetch plan summaries for registered repos via useQueries and tag each option with its repo path.
- Keep filter state local to the overview for now unless the product wants URL persistence later.

Tests
- Extend src/lib/__tests__/beat-state-overview.test.ts or add a focused helper test for user-visible tag extraction, setlist option label truncation at 40 characters, id/alias membership matching, and combined tag/setlist filtering.
- Add a small component test for BeatOverviewTile tag rendering if the existing test setup supports React component rendering; otherwise keep display behavior covered through helper output and source-level component checks.
- Run bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build from the implementation worktree after bun install --frozen-lockfile.

Risks
- Plan summaries require repoPath, so all-repo support needs concurrent per-repo queries and clear disabled/loading states.
- The existing overview helper file is close to the line limit, so new helpers should live in a separate file.
- Some labels are system bookkeeping; rendering all labels would make noisy tags, so filter internal labels intentionally.
